'''Ceok Orou'cya''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and [[First Secretary]] of the [[Combined Bothan Clans|Bothan Council]] during the [[Caamas Document Crisis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
